figures.caption:
Fig. 1. Schematic layout of five main CDI methods and iterative phase
retrieval algorithms. (A) Plane-wave CDI: A plane wave illuminates a sample,
and an oversampled diffraction pattern is measured by a detector. (B) Bragg
CDI: The diffraction pattern surrounding a Bragg peak is acquired from a
nano

within a dotted-line cube in (A). (C) Phase of the ptychographic
